definition: A practitioner who has gone beyond return to the sensual realm and is classically described as not coming back here.
notes: The project keeps non-returner because it is already concise and precise in English. The longer phrase one who does not return is acceptable when a sentence needs more explicitness and less list-like compactness.

context_rules.context: In doctrinal classifications of awakening stages
In explanatory prose where the phrase needs to unpack itself

example_phrases.notes: Useful compound linking attainment-stage language to path language.
